head.title: End-User Guide for the JPS Calculator Application

div.div: End-User Guide for the JPS Calculator Application

div.domains: (map mapgroup-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic delay-d) a(props deliveryTarget) (map ditavalref-d) (map glossref-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic markup-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)

div.div: End-User Guide for the JPS Calculator Application
What is sum up of numbers?
Here you will learn what is sum of numbers.
To sum up numbers using the JPS Calculator app, enter the first number, press the plus button, enter the second number, and press the equals button.
Here you will learn what is subtraction.
Here you will find instructions about using the subtraction feature of JPS Calculator app.

div.domains: (map mapgroup-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic delay-d) a(props deliveryTarget) (map ditavalref-d) (map glossref-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic markup-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)

h2.span: What is sum up of numbers?

div.p: Here you will learn what is sum of numbers.
div.div:
The sum of numbers is the grand total you get when you combine two or more amounts into a single value. You use the sum of numbers daily to calculate total costs, track time, or measure quantities. Every addition problem consists of three basic parts:
Addends: The individual numbers you are combining.
Plus Sign (+): The symbol indicating that the numbers are being added together.
Sum: The final result or total.

div.p: To sum up numbers using the JPS Calculator app, enter the first number, press the plus button, enter the second number, and press the equals button.

section.p: Follow these step-by-step instructions to calculate the sum of two numbers:

li.span: Enter the first number using the on-screen keypad.
Press the plus (+) button to select the addition operation.
Enter the second number using the keypad.
Press the equal (=) button to complete the calculation.

section.p: The final total appears instantly on the primary display screen.

div.section: You want to sum up 2 and 3. The equation will look like: 2+3=5. You enter 2. Press plus. Enter 3. Press equals. The result 5 appears on the screen.

div.domains: (map mapgroup-d) (topic abbrev-d) (topic delay-d) a(props deliveryTarget) (map ditavalref-d) (map glossref-d) (topic hazard-d) (topic hi-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic markup-d) (topic pr-d) (topic relmgmt-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic ut-d) (topic markup-d xml-d)

div.p: Here you will learn what is subtraction.

To successfully perform the task of subtracting numbers, you must know what is subtraction. The term "subtraction" represents a mathematical operation. Subtraction is a process, an action that you do perofmr using numbers. Subtraction allows you to find the difference of 2 numbers.
You use the minus (-) button to express the subtraction operation in the app.
In the subtraction process, you take a number and reduce it to a smaller number. that is, we take away one number from another.
Here you will find instructions about using the subtraction feature of JPS Calculator app.
div.section: To successfully subtract numbers, you must know what is subtraction.
The result from the subtraction is displayed.
You want to subtract 2 from 3. The equation will look like: 3-2=1. You enter 3. Press minus. Enter 2. Press equals. The result 1 appears on the screen.
